description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a sleek, angular design, featuring a metallic silver upper receiver and a dark, matte lower frame. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of wood or a wood-textured material, providing a classic contrast to the otherwise contemporary look. The barrel is relatively short and boxy, with a vented section near the muzzle and a prominent under-barrel attachment or magazine. The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared, enclosing a visible trigger. The overall build suggests a compact, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments. The combination of materials and finishes gives it a professional, high-quality appearance.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a silver metallic upper, dark lower frame, and wood-textured ergonomic grip. Features a short, vented barrel and robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the silver upper receiver, wood-textured grip, and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, venting, and the width of the upper receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour, trigger guard, and the under-barrel component.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, the magazine base, and the alignment of the upper and lower sections.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with robust, angular edges
